textByHashes.47e93eafea18aeb3262c125aa84b8f0c5ce3b449: Would you like to buy or sell some scimitars?

textByHashes.206c3a49099cd06d4c8555f931df3f0ee64689ac: Sorry but you don't have enough to buy one, at the moment it costs 100000 gold coins.
